info.title: School Hostel Enterprise API
info.description: Enterprise-grade API for school academics and residential hostel operations. It includes RBAC, students, attendance, fee collection, hostel occupancy, mess, visitors, leave approvals, complaints, dashboards, and audit logging.

schema.title: Response List Grades Api V1 Academics Grades Get
